name: Pegasus Pharmaceuticals Inc.
summary: Pegasus Pharmaceuticals Inc. manufactures and provides an advanced ECG system for the non-invasive screening of heart pathologies. The company offers HeartVue 6S System, which is a screening tool used to diagnose heart and other cardiac diseases. It serves cardiologists, general practitioners, physicians, intensive care units, hospitals, emergency rooms, clinics, fitness facilities, sports teams, and other emergency medical facilities. Pegasus Pharmaceuticals Inc. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida.
